narrative:
Lowell / Adams (precinct in Washington County) has 1,087 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
